ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, bus, car) */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "analysis_for_day" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being analyzed */,
  "consistency_pct" REAL /* Percentage of consistency in performance */,
  "live_pct" REAL /* Percentage of live performance during the analysis */,
  "gsm_average" REAL /* Average GSM reading */,
  "no_info_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances with no available data */,
  "days_post_installation" INTEGER /* Days since the vehicle was installed */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "speed_average" REAL /* Average speed of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that was installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was installed */,
  "installer" TEXT /* Name of the technician or company that performed the installation */,
  "installation_type" TEXT /* Type of installation (e.g., new, upgrade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work done */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  "driving_experience" INTEGER /* Years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance drop, maintenance needed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle affected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being referenced */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the alert (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_history_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
